user-Fatimah.title: Yesterday we kept you safe
user-Fatimah.body: RM 4,800 scam transfer blocked. Tap to learn how to spot police impersonation scams.

user-Fatimah.title: Message from Ahmad
user-Fatimah.body: Mama, please answer when I call. Don't pick up unknown numbers.

user-Danial.title: Message from Papa
user-Danial.body: Buddy, we set your weekly spend limit to RM 50. Anything bigger we'll review together.

user-ahmad.title: Mama's weekly summary
user-ahmad.body: 12 transactions, RM 380 spent, 0 alerts this week.
